{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Cashier",
  "description": "Addoz Integrated Resources - Our client, a major player and dealers of all types of clothings, thrifts and wears, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location: Mandilas , Lagos Island - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Sector: Sales and Marketing
Industry: Clothing&rsquo;s and Thrifts.

Job Summary


	Our client is seeking a diligent, trustworthy, and detail-oriented Cashier to join the team in Lagos.
	The ideal individual would handle and manage the array&rsquo;s of customers on a B2B or B2C bases with integrity.


Key Responsibilities


	Process customer orders at the counter base on order.
	Handle all transactions, POS, and other customer payments
	Issue receipts and maintain proper transaction records
	Reconcile daily cash sales and balance the register
	Provide excellent and professional customer service
	Support basic sales documentation and reporting
	Ensure proper handling and safeguarding of company fund
	Manage impatient or irritated customers, ensuring customer satisfaction.
	Ensure the register, including all credit card and cash operations are well detailed.


Requirements


	Minimum qualification of an OND, HND, or BSc Degree
	Previous experience in a cashier or similar roles
	Strong numerical ability and attention to detail
	Excellent mathematical and multitasking abilities.
	Honest, reliable, and well-organized personality
	Good communication and customer service skills
	Ability to work with flexibility on a shift basis.
	Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced retail environment
	Adhere to company&rsquo;s policies and procedures.
	The candidate must stay in close proximity to preferred location.


Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: addozrecruitment@gmail.com using &ldquo;Cashier&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-18",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

  },

Cashier Job at Addoz Integrated Resources




        
    

        
        Addoz Integrated Resources - Our client, a major player and dealers of all types of clothings, thrifts and wears, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location: Mandilas , Lagos Island - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Sector: Sales and Marketing
Industry: Clothing’s and Thrifts.

Job Summary


	Our client is seeking a diligent, trustworthy, and detail-oriented Cashier to join the team in Lagos.
	The ideal individual would handle and manage the array’s of customers on a B2B or B2C bases with integrity.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Process customer orders at the counter base on order.
	Handle all transactions, POS, and other customer payments
	Issue receipts and maintain proper transaction records
	Reconcile daily cash sales and balance the register
	Provide excellent and professional customer service
	Support basic sales documentation and reporting
	Ensure proper handling and safeguarding of company fund
	Manage impatient or irritated customers, ensuring customer satisfaction.
	Ensure the register, including all credit card and cash operations are well detailed.


Requirements


	Minimum qualification of an OND, HND, or BSc Degree
	Previous experience in a cashier or similar roles
	Strong numerical ability and attention to detail
	Excellent mathematical and multitasking abilities.
	Honest, reliable, and well-organized personality
	Good communication and customer service skills
	Ability to work with flexibility on a shift basis.
	Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced retail environment
	Adhere to company’s policies and procedures.
	The candidate must stay in close proximity to preferred location.


Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Cashier” as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "SAP Procurement Specialist",
  "description": "Plan International is an independent development and humanitarian non-profit organisation that advances children&rsquo;s rights and equality for girls. We support children&rsquo;s rights from birth until they reach adulthood, and enable children to prepare for - and respond to - crises and adversity. We believe in the power and potential of every child, but know this is often suppressed by poverty, violence, exclusion and discrimination.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: SAP Procurement Specialist&nbsp;

Job Location: Nigeria
Job Type: Permanent or maximum fixed term contract as per employing office&rsquo;s standard terms and conditions
Reports to: Head of Supply Chain System and Standards

The Opportunity


	We&rsquo;re seeking a detail-oriented SAP Procurement Specialist to support global users of SAP S/4HANA (MM).
	You&rsquo;ll play a key role in keeping procurement operations running smoothly resolving queries, maintaining data accuracy, and supporting system workflows, access, and vendor management.
	This is a high-volume, hands-on role ideal for someone who thrives in a structured, process-driven environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide front-line support for SAP procurement queries and transactional issues (PR, PO, MIGO, GR/IR).
	Maintain approval workflows, hierarchies, and procurement data integrity.
	Manage SAP user access, roles, and security compliance.
	Administer vendor master data, ensuring accuracy and compliance.
	Support reporting, data analysis, and continuous improvement initiatives.
	Deliver user training and collaborate with global stakeholders.


Essential Skills &amp; Experience


	SAP S/4HANA MM expertise (Procurement / P2P), ideally SAP certified.
	Strong hands-on experience in SAP operational/system support.
	Knowledge of workflows, master data, and access controls.
	Ability to manage high-volume queries and troubleshoot issues effectively.
	Advanced Excel skills (data tracking, reporting, analysis).
	Excellent attention to detail and problem-solving skills.
	Strong communication skills with a service-oriented mindset.


Desirable:


	Experience with SAP Finance / Projects / Grants.
	International or NGO experience.
	Additional languages (e.g. French or Spanish).


Salary


	?We will be happy to disclose the salary and applicable benefits to applicants as part of this process, however, please kindly note that the salary and employment benefits will be set according to your location and therefore it is not possible to include full details here.?
	Please note this is NOT an International / expat position.


Note


	Anticipated interview Dates: Week commencing 22nd June.
	Equality, diversity and inclusion is at the very heart of everything that Plan International stands for.
	Plan International will never send unsolicited emails requesting payment from candidates.&nbsp;
",

  },

SAP Procurement Specialist Job at Plan International




        
    

        
        Plan International is an independent development and humanitarian non-profit organisation that advances children’s rights and equality for girls. We support children’s rights from birth until they reach adulthood, and enable children to prepare for - and respond to - crises and adversity. We believe in the power and potential of every child, but know this is often suppressed by poverty, violence, exclusion and discrimination.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: SAP Procurement Specialist 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Nigeria
Job Type: Permanent or maximum fixed term contract as per employing office’s standard terms and conditions
Reports to: Head of Supply Chain System and Standards

The Opportunity


	We’re seeking a detail-oriented SAP Procurement Specialist to support global users of SAP S/4HANA (MM).
	You’ll play a key role in keeping procurement operations running smoothly resolving queries, maintaining data accuracy, and supporting system workflows, access, and vendor management.
	This is a high-volume, hands-on role ideal for someone who thrives in a structured, process-driven environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide front-line support for SAP procurement queries and transactional issues (PR, PO, MIGO, GR/IR).
	Maintain approval workflows, hierarchies, and procurement data integrity.
	Manage SAP user access, roles, and security compliance.
	Administer vendor master data, ensuring accuracy and compliance.
	Support reporting, data analysis, and continuous improvement initiatives.
	Deliver user training and collaborate with global stakeholders.


Essential Skills & Experience


	SAP S/4HANA MM expertise (Procurement / P2P), ideally SAP certified.
	Strong hands-on experience in SAP operational/system support.
	Knowledge of workflows, master data, and access controls.
	Ability to manage high-volume queries and troubleshoot issues effectively.
	Advanced Excel skills (data tracking, reporting, analysis).
	Excellent attention to detail and problem-solving skills.
	Strong communication skills with a service-oriented mindset.


Desirable:


	Experience with SAP Finance / Projects / Grants.
	International or NGO experience.
	Additional languages (e.g. French or Spanish).


Salary


	?We will be happy to disclose the salary and applicable benefits to applicants as part of this process, however, please kindly note that the salary and employment benefits will be set according to your location and therefore it is not possible to include full details here.?
	Please note this is NOT an International / expat position.


Note


	Anticipated interview Dates: Week commencing 22nd June.
	Equality, diversity and inclusion is at the very heart of everything that Plan International stands for.
	Plan International will never send unsolicited emails requesting payment from candidates. 
    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Pharmacist&nbsp;

Job Location: Lugbe, Abuja
Job Type: Full time
Department: Pharmacy
Report: Assistant Manager, Pharmacy Operations

Duties and Responsibilities&nbsp; &nbsp;
Purpose:


	Provide effective medication use and become the people&rsquo;s trusted ally against health issues that way, you can deliver maximum value to both the pharmacy and society. Review and develop the clinic&#39;s pharmacy policies and regulations.
	Participate in voluntary community health activities to promote, maintain and restore health and prevent diseases. Manage clinical risk.
	Provide professional advice on cosmetics or para-pharmaceuticals.


Engagement:


	Document patient and family education. Develop and implement the teaching plan utilizing the patient education manual. Think critically in adapting to change, judging situations, and taking appropriate decisions.
	Adhere to EHA Clinics Code of Conduct as well as ethical standards of the field.
	Interpret symptoms so that the patient can either be given immediate treatment for a trifling condition or be referred to the doctor. Protect patients and technicians by adhering to infection-control protocols. Provide emotional support and measures to alleviate fear and anxiety.
	Provide pharmaceutical care services which may include, but are not limited to, patient needs assessment, age and disease-specific drug therapy and patient education, care adjustments based on patient response, and clinical interventions to identify, minimize, and avoid adverse drug reactions.


Delivery:


	Prepare and dispense medications to patients on physician&rsquo;s order.
	Organize the pharmacy in an efficient manner to make the identification of products easier and faster.
	Maintain an up-to-date inventory of the clinic drug formulary.
	Records of all drugs, doses, and prices on the automated inventory of the clinic. Review, analyze and respond to different situations encountered daily.
	Review and execute physician&rsquo;s prescriptions checking their appropriateness and legality.
	Maintain full control over delivering, stocking, and labeling medicine and other products.
	Develop effective medication plans to minimize the risk of adverse side effects.
	Maintain pharmacological knowledge by attending educational workshops; reviewing professional publications; establishing personal networks; and participating in professional societies.


Targeted Specialized Knowledge&nbsp;


	Minimum qualification of Bachelor&#39;s degree in Pharmacy/M.Pharm/PharmD
	Minimum of two (2) years of post NYSC progressive experience in Pharmacy within the private and public sector.
	Experience working with public health and health systems is an advantage.
	Candidates must be a registered member of Pharmacists Council of Nigeria (PCN) with an up-to-date practicing license.


?Key Areas of Note:&nbsp;


	Keep up to date with relevant medical research, technology, and evidence-based medical practice by attending continuing education courses and professional meetings, reading journals, etc.
	Research unusual symptoms and treatment options, through consultation with physicians and other medical specialists.


Key Skills and Attributes:


	Hold Computer literacy
	Excellent Communication and Customer Service
	Caring, Compassionate, Dedicated and Professional
	Working Under Pressure
	Humane, Empathetic and Supportive Bedside Manner
	Leadership and Teamwork
	Problem solving and Initiative
	Time Management and Organization
	Attention to Detail.

Pharmacist  Job at EHA Clinics




        
    

        
        EHA Clinics, a subsidiary of eHealth Africa, is a health care network operating across Nigeria that provides high-quality, innovative, data-driven, and technology-enabled services. EHA Clinics delivers a comprehensive range of state of the art health care services in each location, e.g,  general consultations, laboratory investigations, pharmaceuticals, annual medical checks, child wellness checks, ultrasonography, and specialized services (urgent care, telemedicine, home care, dental care, and ophthalmology).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Pharmacist 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lugbe, Abuja
Job Type: Full time
Department: Pharmacy
Report: Assistant Manager, Pharmacy Operations

Duties and Responsibilities   
Purpose:


	Provide effective medication use and become the people’s trusted ally against health issues that way, you can deliver maximum value to both the pharmacy and society. Review and develop the clinic's pharmacy policies and regulations.
	Participate in voluntary community health activities to promote, maintain and restore health and prevent diseases. Manage clinical risk.
	Provide professional advice on cosmetics or para-pharmaceuticals.


Engagement:


	Document patient and family education. Develop and implement the teaching plan utilizing the patient education manual. Think critically in adapting to change, judging situations, and taking appropriate decisions.
	Adhere to EHA Clinics Code of Conduct as well as ethical standards of the field.
	Interpret symptoms so that the patient can either be given immediate treatment for a trifling condition or be referred to the doctor. Protect patients and technicians by adhering to infection-control protocols. Provide emotional support and measures to alleviate fear and anxiety.
	Provide pharmaceutical care services which may include, but are not limited to, patient needs assessment, age and disease-specific drug therapy and patient education, care adjustments based on patient response, and clinical interventions to identify, minimize, and avoid adverse drug reactions.


Delivery:


	Prepare and dispense medications to patients on physician’s order.
	Organize the pharmacy in an efficient manner to make the identification of products easier and faster.
	Maintain an up-to-date inventory of the clinic drug formulary.
	Records of all drugs, doses, and prices on the automated inventory of the clinic. Review, analyze and respond to different situations encountered daily.
	Review and execute physician’s prescriptions checking their appropriateness and legality.
	Maintain full control over delivering, stocking, and labeling medicine and other products.
	Develop effective medication plans to minimize the risk of adverse side effects.
	Maintain pharmacological knowledge by attending educational workshops; reviewing professional publications; establishing personal networks; and participating in professional societies.


Targeted Specialized Knowledge 


	Minimum qualification of Bachelor's degree in Pharmacy/M.Pharm/PharmD
	Minimum of two (2) years of post NYSC progressive experience in Pharmacy within the private and public sector.
	Experience working with public health and health systems is an advantage.
	Candidates must be a registered member of Pharmacists Council of Nigeria (PCN) with an up-to-date practicing license.


?Key Areas of Note: 


	Keep up to date with relevant medical research, technology, and evidence-based medical practice by attending continuing education courses and professional meetings, reading journals, etc.
	Research unusual symptoms and treatment options, through consultation with physicians and other medical specialists.


Key Skills and Attributes:


	Hold Computer literacy
	Excellent Communication and Customer Service
	Caring, Compassionate, Dedicated and Professional
	Working Under Pressure
	Humane, Empathetic and Supportive Bedside Manner
	Leadership and Teamwork
	Problem solving and Initiative
	Time Management and Organization
	Attention to Detail.


Key Areas of Note:


	Keep up to date with relevant medical research, technology, and evidence-based medical practice by attending continuing education courses and professional meetings, reading journals, etc.
	Research unusual symptoms and treatment options, through consultation with physicians and other medical specialists.


Key Skills and Attributes:


	Hold Computer literacy
	Excellent Communication and Customer Service
	Caring, Compassionate, Dedicated and Professional
	Working Under Pressure
	Humane, Empathetic and Supportive Bedside Manner
	Leadership and Teamwork
	Problem solving and Initiative
	Time Management and Organization
	Attention to Details.


Benefits 


	Salary: N181,000 monthly gross. 
	Health Coverage Benefit 
	Performance Bonus
	13th Month
	Annual Skills Assessment.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media and Content Associate",
  "description": "FirstExcelsia is a firm of highly versatile and renowned Human Resources, Organisational Development and Management consultants with operations across several states in Nigeria. We have an in-depth understanding of the Nigerian business terrain and we are very passionate about partnering with indigenous organisations to develop glocalised HR solutions, processes and structures required to develop and effectively drive our clients&#39; corporate strategies.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media and Content Associate

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Fashion Industry

Description


	Are you passionate about content creation, digital storytelling, and social media growth?
	We are looking for a creative, trendy, and detail-oriented Social Media &amp; Content Associate to help grow our digital presence through engaging content, community engagement, and strategic storytelling.


Responsibilities


	Create engaging and visually appealing content for Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, and other digital platforms, including reels, graphics, carousels, captions, and short-form videos.
	Capture behind-the-scenes moments, studio activities, events, and day-to-day brand experiences for real-time and curated content.
	Support campaign shoots, content productions, lookbooks, and collection teasers.
	Edit short-form videos and social media content for regular posting and audience engagement.
	Develop and maintain content calendars aligned with campaigns, product launches, promotions, and cultural moments.
	Schedule and publish content consistently across all social media platforms.
	Monitor social media engagement, audience growth, platform performance, and content reach to optimize strategies and improve visibility.
	Research trends, viral content, digital tools, algorithms, memes, and cultural moments relevant to the brand&rsquo;s audience and positioning.
	Support influencer collaborations, community partnerships, and content-sharing initiatives.
	Build and maintain a strong, engaging, and culturally relevant brand voice across digital platforms.
	Collaborate with internal teams on campaign rollouts, newsletters, customer communications, and marketing initiatives.
	Provide live content coverage during events, pop-ups, product launches, and other brand activations.
	Maintain organized folders for content drafts, raw footage, edited materials, campaign assets, and brand resources.
	Prepare weekly and monthly social media reports covering engagement, follower growth, conversions, reach, and campaign performance.
	Track influencer collaborations, reposts, press mentions, and partnership activities for proper documentation and follow-up.
	Demonstrate creativity, strong attention to detail, problem-solving ability, adaptability, and excellent storytelling skills in executing tasks.
	Effectively manage multiple projects, deadlines, and content schedules in a fast-paced environment.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree, HND, or equivalent qualification.
	Minimum of 5 years of work experience.
	At least 3 years of experience in social media management and content creation.
	Strong understanding of social media platforms, content trends, and audience engagement strategies.
	Experience with video editing, content creation tools, and visual storytelling.
	Excellent communication, interpersonal, and organizational skills.
	Strong documentation, reporting, and time management abilities.
	Ability to analyze social media performance metrics and generate actionable insights.
	Creative mindset with the ability to develop engaging and brand-aligned content ideas.
	Ability to work collaboratively and thrive in a dynamic creative environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: talentsearch@firstexcelsia.com using &ldquo;Social Media &amp; Content Associate Application&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Social Media and Content Associate Job at FirstExcelsia




        
    

        
        FirstExcelsia is a firm of highly versatile and renowned Human Resources, Organisational Development and Management consultants with operations across several states in Nigeria. We have an in-depth understanding of the Nigerian business terrain and we are very passionate about partnering with indigenous organisations to develop glocalised HR solutions, processes and structures required to develop and effectively drive our clients' corporate strategies.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media and Content Associate

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Fashion Industry

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Are you passionate about content creation, digital storytelling, and social media growth?
	We are looking for a creative, trendy, and detail-oriented Social Media & Content Associate to help grow our digital presence through engaging content, community engagement, and strategic storytelling.


Responsibilities


	Create engaging and visually appealing content for Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, and other digital platforms, including reels, graphics, carousels, captions, and short-form videos.
	Capture behind-the-scenes moments, studio activities, events, and day-to-day brand experiences for real-time and curated content.
	Support campaign shoots, content productions, lookbooks, and collection teasers.
	Edit short-form videos and social media content for regular posting and audience engagement.
	Develop and maintain content calendars aligned with campaigns, product launches, promotions, and cultural moments.
	Schedule and publish content consistently across all social media platforms.
	Monitor social media engagement, audience growth, platform performance, and content reach to optimize strategies and improve visibility.
	Research trends, viral content, digital tools, algorithms, memes, and cultural moments relevant to the brand’s audience and positioning.
	Support influencer collaborations, community partnerships, and content-sharing initiatives.
	Build and maintain a strong, engaging, and culturally relevant brand voice across digital platforms.
	Collaborate with internal teams on campaign rollouts, newsletters, customer communications, and marketing initiatives.
	Provide live content coverage during events, pop-ups, product launches, and other brand activations.
	Maintain organized folders for content drafts, raw footage, edited materials, campaign assets, and brand resources.
	Prepare weekly and monthly social media reports covering engagement, follower growth, conversions, reach, and campaign performance.
	Track influencer collaborations, reposts, press mentions, and partnership activities for proper documentation and follow-up.
	Demonstrate creativity, strong attention to detail, problem-solving ability, adaptability, and excellent storytelling skills in executing tasks.
	Effectively manage multiple projects, deadlines, and content schedules in a fast-paced environment.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree, HND, or equivalent qualification.
	Minimum of 5 years of work experience.
	At least 3 years of experience in social media management and content creation.
	Strong understanding of social media platforms, content trends, and audience engagement strategies.
	Experience with video editing, content creation tools, and visual storytelling.
	Excellent communication, interpersonal, and organizational skills.
	Strong documentation, reporting, and time management abilities.
	Ability to analyze social media performance metrics and generate actionable insights.
	Creative mindset with the ability to develop engaging and brand-aligned content ideas.
	Ability to work collaboratively and thrive in a dynamic creative environment.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: [email protected] using “Social Media & Content Associate Application” as the subject of the email.
